# The Creatives Room

> A curated platform where creative professionals discover, save, and share creative references — from ad films to visual campaigns.

The Creatives Room is a community-driven archive for advertising and film creatives. Members can browse a growing collection of creative references, organize them into personal folders, follow other creatives, and get AI-powered inspiration by matching campaign briefs to relevant work.

## Pages

- [/](/): Browse the creative reference archive with filtering by category, media type, and search.
- [/users](/users): Explore creatives on the platform and discover their collections.
- [/u/:username](/u/:username): Creative profiles showcasing their public folders and curated references.
- [/u/:username/:folderSlug](/u/:username/:folderSlug): Public folders and collections of creative references curated by a member.
- [/welcome](/welcome): Getting started guide for new members joining the community.
- [/privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy and data handling practices.
- [/terms](/terms): Terms of service and community guidelines.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Full site index for search engines.
